# /blueprint

> Feature-scoped blueprint covering F&O model + module layering + integration topology + ALM deployable-package layout.

## Usage

```
/blueprint [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/{fdd,tdd,plan}.md`
- [templates/blueprint.template.md](../../templates/blueprint.template.md)
- [constitution/01-architectural-principles.md](../../constitution/01-architectural-principles.md) (extension-over-modification, config-first 5-level priority)
- [constitution/05-development-and-alm.md](../../constitution/05-development-and-alm.md) (LCS / deployable-package model)

## Execution flow

1. Render `blueprint.template.md` into `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/blueprint.md`.
2. Populate:
   - C4-L1 System Context (F&O LCS + Azure-side integrations + retail channels where applicable)
   - C4-L2 Containers (AOS, BatchAOS, DMF instances, ER service, Synapse Link / BYOD)
   - C4-L3 Components per object-type category
   - Model dependency graph (this feature's model + dependent base models)
   - Deployable package layout
   - Security topology (security keys → duties → privileges → role bindings)
3. **Inline self-check** against [templates/checklists/blueprint-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/blueprint-review.checklist.md).
4. Run `doc_lint` (Mermaid-only enforced).
5. `currentStates += BLUEPRINT_DRAFT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/blueprint.md`

- [constitution/01-architectural-principles.md](../../constitution/01-architectural-principles.md)
